event: Congress of Berlin revises San Stefano; empire survives
Ramazan decree: interest on the debt halved - partial default
Decree of Muharrem: debt written down ~50%; Ottoman Public Debt Administration created
Herzegovina uprising opens the Great Eastern Crisis
Serbia and Montenegro declare war on the Porte
Sultan Abduelaziz deposed (dead days later); Murad V installed
Adrianople armistice: Russians within sight of Constantinople
Vienna crash begins the world credit contraction that shuts new lending
